classes.description: Base class for spaces that coordinate hierarchical work.

verbs.name: create_task
verbs.source: verb :create_task(title, description) rx { let task = create($task, title); task.description = description; task.space = this; this.root_tasks = append(this.root_tasks, task); observe({ type: "task_created", task: task, parent: null, title: title }); return task; }

classes.description: Base class for taskspace work items.

verbs.name: add_subtask
verbs.source: verb :add_subtask(title, description) rx { let child = create($task, title); child.description = description; child.parent_task = this; child.space = this.space; this.subtasks = append(this.subtasks, child); observe({ type: "task_created", task: child, parent: this, title: title }); observe({ type: "subtask_added", parent: this, child: child, index: length(this.subtasks) - 1 }); return child; }

verbs.name: move
verbs.source: verb :move(parent, index) rx { move_task(this, parent, index); observe({ type: "task_moved", task: this, to_parent: parent, index: index }); return this; }

verbs.name: claim
verbs.source: verb :claim() rx { if (this.assignee != null && this.assignee != actor) raise(E_CONFLICT); this.assignee = actor; this.status = "claimed"; observe({ type: "task_claimed", task: this, actor: actor }); return this; }

verbs.name: release
verbs.source: verb :release() rx { this.assignee = null; if (this.status != "done") this.status = "open"; observe({ type: "task_released", task: this }); return this; }

verbs.name: set_status
verbs.source: verb :set_status(status) rx { let from = this.status; this.status = status; observe({ type: "status_changed", task: this, from: from, to: status }); return status; }

verbs.name: add_requirement
verbs.source: verb :add_requirement(text) rx { this.requirements = append(this.requirements, { text: text, checked: false }); observe({ type: "requirement_added", task: this, index: length(this.requirements) - 1, text: text }); return length(this.requirements) - 1; }

verbs.name: check_requirement
verbs.source: verb :check_requirement(index, checked) rx { this.requirements[index].checked = checked; observe({ type: "requirement_checked", task: this, index: index, checked: checked }); return checked; }

verbs.name: add_message
verbs.source: verb :add_message(body) rx { let msg = { actor: actor, ts: now(), body: body }; this.messages = append(this.messages, msg); observe({ type: "message_added", task: this, actor: actor, body: body, ts: msg.ts }); return msg; }

verbs.name: add_artifact
verbs.source: verb :add_artifact(ref) rx { ref.added_by = actor; ref.added_at = now(); this.artifacts = append(this.artifacts, ref); observe({ type: "artifact_attached", task: this, ref: ref }); return ref; }
